name: checkpoint-thread
description: Enforce thread-scoped Git checkpoints before Codex mutations and ship only verified, thread-owned work.

interface.shortDescription: Checkpoint and ship thread-owned Git work.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight skill plus PreToolUse guard that establishes a recoverable baseline before Codex mutates a repository, binds verification to exact Git state, and ships only thread-owned commits.
defaultPrompt: Use checkpoint-thread to make and ship this repository change safely.
